## TRM1.4. Vertical flight efficiency of the descent (PI#7)

Compared to the overall RP4 average value (149.2 seconds per flight), average times flown level during descent are on average 30.6 seconds per flight higher in Switzerland. The highest average time flown level during descent happens at Geneva (LSGG) (193.8 seconds per flight), while the lowest happens at Zurich (LSZH) (170.8 seconds per flight).
